_comment: Example SONiC MCP inventory. Copy to inventory.json and edit. Per-device credentials are optional; without them, resolution falls back to SONIC_HOST_<ip>_* then SONIC_DEFAULT_USERNAME / _PASSWORD from .env, then the SONiC factory default 'admin' / 'YourPaSsWoRd'.
_security: Prefer 'password_env' (name of an env var holding the secret) over an inline 'password' so no plaintext secret lives in this file. Keep the real inventory.json out of Git (it is git-ignored) and off screenshots/logs.

switches._note: Per-switch credentials via env var — set SONIC_SPINE1_PASSWORD in your environment.
switches.name: spine1
